subject: DIRECTIVE: three autonomous operation types — terminology + dashboard placement

body.summary: Establishes canonical terminology for three distinct autonomous processing operations mapped to neural oscillatory bands. Requests dashboard integration in the interagent LCARS dashboard at appropriate stations.

deliberation.definition: Autonomous claude -p invocation that generates new decisions, processes inbound messages, and produces artifacts. Active cognition — the agent thinks about something and produces output.
existing_infrastructure: claude -p invocation via autonomous-sync.sh or meshd oscillator
deliberation.observable_signals: Tool calls active, token output rate elevated, file modifications occurring

consolidation.definition: Processing existing state into more organized form. Not generating new decisions — reorganizing, indexing, and persisting what already exists. Named after memory consolidation (Stickgold, 2005).
existing_infrastructure: /cycle skill (lab-notebook, journal, architecture, memory, snapshot, commit)
consolidation.observable_signals: Memory writes, transport indexing, git commits of documentation (not code), /cycle step progression

clearance.definition: Waste removal — deleting stale entries, canceling expired messages, repairing state drift, resolving orphaned references. Not organizing — removing. Named after glymphatic clearance (Iliff et al., 2012).
existing_infrastructure: state-reconcile.py (7 waste classes: orphaned messages, stale heartbeats, expired gates, dangling references, unresolved flags, schema drift, zombie sessions)
clearance.observable_signals: File deletions, state.db row removals, MANIFEST cleanup, archive moves, no new content generated

processing_cycle.sequence: deliberation (beta) → consolidation (theta) → clearance (delta) → idle readiness (alpha) → next deliberation
processing_cycle.invariant: Skipping consolidation or clearance accumulates debt. The restart detector (Session 93) empirically measured this: at 80% context, theta consolidation windows close, and the agent begins failing to self-correct.

dashboard_directive.request: Add the three operation types to the interagent LCARS dashboard at appropriate locations. Each agent panel should display which operation type currently dominates.

placement.component: Operation type indicator — shows current dominant operation (deliberation/consolidation/clearance/idle) with color coding. Integrate with the oscillatory heartbeat band power display from turn 2 spec.
placement.data_source: mesh.oscillator/v1 → dominant_band field. Mapping: beta/gamma=deliberation, theta=consolidation, delta=clearance, alpha=idle.

placement.component: Mesh-wide operation distribution — a summary showing how many agents currently perform each operation type. Pie chart or stacked bar. Enables the operator to see at a glance whether the mesh balances between active work and maintenance.
placement.data_source: Aggregate dominant_band across all agents publishing mesh.oscillator.

placement.component: Operation cycle timeline — a horizontal timeline showing operation type transitions over the last hour per agent. Reveals whether agents cycle properly (deliberation → consolidation → clearance) or get stuck in one mode. Band starvation (theta/delta never appearing) signals debt accumulation.
placement.data_source: mesh.oscillator/v1 history (retained in meshd memory or state.db).

dashboard_directive.accessibility: Color coding must pair with a redundant channel (text label or icon). Deliberation=amber+lightning, Consolidation=blue+archive, Clearance=indigo+broom, Idle=green+pause. Per T18 Check 6 (WCAG 2.1 AA).

epistemic_flags: The three-operation taxonomy covers observed autonomous behaviors but may not exhaust all operation types. Future operations (e.g., inter-agent negotiation, scheduled publishing) may require additional categories.

The processing cycle sequence (deliberation→consolidation→clearance→idle) represents the expected healthy pattern. Actual agent behavior may not follow this sequence — the dashboard should display observed sequence, not enforce it.
Band-to-operation mapping assumes dominant_band reliably indicates operation type. Mixed-band states (e.g., simultaneous deliberation and consolidation) may produce ambiguous classification.

action_gate.gate_condition: Dashboard implementation. Psychology provides terminology, color coding, station placement, data source mapping. Operations implements the LCARS components.
